title: A first in the Garden Route – 24/7 veterinary nursing
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet is a local...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet is a local veterinary health and retail group in the Garden Route, with branches in George and Mossel Bay.

Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre is the hub of the Vitalvet group, based at 10 Knysna Road in George. The practice is equipped with the full range of Idexx in-house laboratory equipment on site, the latest IM3 dental equipment, an isolation ward for animals with contagious diseases and separate dog and cat kennels.


> At Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre, we consult six days a week and recently implemented 24/7 veterinary nursing care, meaning your animals receive round-the-clock care and comfort.


This service is perfect for pets needing overnight monitoring, recovering post-surgery or needing specialised treatment. We recently added three more qualified and registered veterinary nurses to our team, which ensures extraordinary inpatient care.

Our veterinary nurses also have their own consulting stream and can assist with anything from anal gland and vaccinations to bandage changes and blood collection.

Our team of highly skilled veterinarians are always available on call, offering diverse capabilities and collaborating efforts. They are supported by a team of veterinary nurses and kennel hands.


> Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre’s kennel hands have years of experience with animals, handling them and giving them extra comfort by providing clean bedding and kennels.


Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre also has direct links with specialised veterinarians such as Dr Christiaan Triegaardt of CSSV in Cape Town, Professor Johan Schoeman, the head of department of companion animal clinical studies at the veterinary faculty of the University of Pretoria, and veterinary ophthalmologist Dr Izak Venter, ensuring your animal receives the best possible care.

Visit our brand-new website, www.vitalvet.co.za, to find out more about the services we offer, get to know our excellent staff and sign up for our newsletter.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
